results.title: U.S. and Iran vie for Strait of Hormuz, waterway key to global energy supplies, in latest attacks
results.description: The United States and Iran each are asserting they control the Strait of Hormuz after a weekend of attacks stretching across the wider Middle East. The attacks that continued into Monday morning further threatened any diplomacy to end the war....
results.source: Santa Fe New Mexican Homepage | Santa Fe New Mexic
